name: timescaledb
description: TimescaleDB is a PostgreSQL extension optimized for time-series data. This container runs a full PostgreSQL 15 instance with TimescaleDB pre-installed, intended for use with Tracearr.

variables.name: Postgres User
variables.description: Database user that will be created on first startup.

variables.name: Postgres Password
variables.description: Secure password for the database user. Must be set before starting the container.

variables.name: Postgres DB
variables.description: Name of the database that will be automatically created on first startup.

variables.name: Timezone
variables.description: Timezone of the container, e.g. Europe/Vienna or Europe/Berlin.
